violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register food safety manager with the RIDOH. Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the 3-door reach-in were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer had an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Deli slicer was cleaned during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
